headline: Tesla Autonomy Pop-Up opens TODAY at F1 Miami Grand Prix — Cybercab and Optimus on display at Lummus Park Fan Fest through May 3; highest-visibility public showcase of Tesla's autonomous stack yet, timed to F1 Crypto.com race weekend crowds

Musk: Optimus V3 is 'Special' — deliberate reveal delay to block competitor copying; Gen 3 on track for public unveiling later in 2026; Fremont factory retooling for Optimus production begins in early May

Ross Gerber: Tesla + SpaceX merger would create 'Berkshire Hathaway of AI' — TSLA slips in premarket as speculation intensifies ahead of potential SpaceX IPO and H1 2027 merger timeline flagged by Wedbush

Tesla 2026.14.3 Spring Update hits 3rd wave rollout — Hey Grok voice AI, FSD app redesign, 24hr Dashcam, and Cyberhog Pet Mode now reaching broader fleet; Grok can now 'see' saved location labels for natural language nav
Tesla AI5 chip design finalized in April 2026 — next-generation inference processor completed at Tesla's Research Fab at Giga Texas; will power future FSD + Optimus workloads; successor to HW4/AI4+

FSD v14.3.2 (2026.2.9.9) released — adds Blind Spot Warning While Parked, Supercharger Site Maps, and service mode improvements; marks rapid cadence of FSD point releases continuing post-v14 architecture launch

Dan Ives (Wedbush) forecasts Tesla-SpaceX merger in H1 2027 — Musk seeking to build unified AI conglomerate; Tesla's $2B SpaceX equity investment in Q1 seen as the financial bridge ahead of a formal combination

HW3 vehicles confirmed incapable of Unsupervised FSD — Musk on Q1 call: 'Hardware 3 simply does not have the capability'; cites 1/8 the memory bandwidth of HW4 as choke point; FSD v14 Lite for HW3 owners by June 2026, discounted trade-in program offered
